name: JiaoZuo WanFang Aluminum Manufacturing Co., Ltd
summary: JiaoZuo WanFang Aluminum Manufacturing Co., Ltd engages in the smelting and processing of aluminum products in China. The company primarily provides electrolytic aluminum products. It is also involved in the generation and distribution of thermal power; distribution of non-ferrous metals; and production and distribution of coal. The company is based in Jiaozuo, China.
